calculated_metrics.confidence_note: This unit cost is estimated by PRISM by dividing total programme expenditure by the total quantified animal beneficiaries.

details.calculation: ($10,520,400 USD / 37,589 total beneficiaries) = $279.88 USD per outcome. | A $1,000 USD donation achieves ≈ 4 outcomes.

calculated_metrics.name: Cost Per Outcome (USD)

details.elaboration: This check rewards transparency for a sensitive operational metric.

source.quote: Administration and governance 9%
Income generation 25%
Moon Bear Protection 55%
Animal Sentience and Welfare 9%
Cat and Dog Welfare 9%
Public Education 27%
Programs 66%
RUNNING COSTS $15.94m
GLOBAL INCOME $20.68M (all amounts in US$)
RUNNING COSTS $15.94m
Helped 13,350 shelter dogs and cats in China.
Helped rescue and release over 23,000 songbirds confiscated from illegal traders.
Helped neuter 467 cats through our trap, neuter, return projects with 17 groups.
In 2024, our three smallies clinics treated 436 companion animals - 264 dogs and 172 cats.
Helped release 31 macaques into protected areas.
Provided supplementary food for 25 macaques we previously helped release.
Provided 15 dogs and cats with new wheelchairs through Vietnamese NGO Forever Wheelchair.
Rescued 13 precious moon bears and brought them home to our sanctuaries in Vietnam.
Rescued 2 more elephants from elephant-riding tourism. Kham On and Y'Mam are now free to roam for the rest of their days.
We helped rebuild a fire-damaged shelter in China, benefiting 250 cats.
Animals Asia Foundation (AAF) is a Hong Kong–based charity that seeks to end cruelty to animals in Asia.

metrics.context_qualifier: Reached over 33 million people on social media via global English-language posts.
metrics.metric_name: People reached via global English social media

source.quote: Reached over 33m people on social media via our global English-language posts.

metrics.context_qualifier: Engaged with Chinese-language social media posts on animal sentience, welfare, and environment.
metrics.metric_name: People reached via Chinese social media

source.quote: Engaged with over 25m people who saw our Chinese-language social media posts on animal sentience, welfare and the environment. We posted 353 messages.

metrics.context_qualifier: Rescued and released from illegal traders in Indonesia.

source.quote: Helped rescue and release over 23,000 songbirds confiscated from illegal traders.

metrics.context_qualifier: Helped 13,350 shelter dogs and cats in 33 struggling shelters in China.
metrics.metric_name: Shelter dogs and cats helped in China

source.quote: Helped 13,350 shelter dogs and cats in China.

metrics.context_qualifier: Donated to dogs in Vietnamese shelters, especially in areas with recent rabies outbreaks.

source.quote: Donated 10,400 doses of rabies vaccine to dogs in Vietnamese shelters.

metrics.context_qualifier: Engaged with Vietnamese-language social media posts on animal sentience, welfare, and environment.
metrics.metric_name: People reached via Vietnamese social media

source.quote: Engaged with over 5.9m people who viewed our Vietnamese-language social media posts on animal sentience, welfare and the environment. We posted 108 messages.

metrics.context_qualifier: Joined events promoting World Frog Day, World Bee Day, World Migratory Bird Day, and ending animal use in entertainment.

source.quote: Over 16,900 people joined the activities.

metrics.context_qualifier: Fed to bears at sanctuaries, including pumpkin, carrot, sweet potato, cabbage, tomato, apple, and pear.
metrics.metric_name: Kilograms of nutritious food for bears

source.quote: Fed the bears at our sanctuaries over 350,000 kilograms of nutritious food, including pumpkin, carrot, sweet potato, cabbage, tomato, apple and pear.

metrics.context_qualifier: Prepared to help bears take their meds, filled with treats like banana chunks, sweet syrup, or rice porridge.

source.quote: Prepared over 150,000 medication pots used to help the bears take their meds.

metrics.context_qualifier: Stuffed with tablets for bears at the China sanctuary.
metrics.metric_name: Marshmallows stuffed with tablets for bears

source.quote: Stuffed 142,050 marshmallows with tablets for the bears at our China sanctuary.

metrics.context_qualifier: Visited by registered therapy dogs in mainland China and Hong Kong.

source.quote: Visited over 18,800 people with our registered therapy dogs - 10,029 in mainland China and 8,775 in Hong Kong.

metrics.context_qualifier: Delivered webinars on animal management, including advanced animal training and humane pest management.

source.quote: Delivered webinars to 2,560 animal management staff

metrics.context_qualifier: Gave 1.5 tonnes of rice, 2 tonnes of kibble, 4,500 cans of food, treats, and medicines to 18 shelters.
metrics.metric_name: Dogs and cats helped in shelters (food/medicine)

source.quote: Gave 1.5 tonnes of rice, 2 tonnes of kibble, 4,500 cans of food, treats and medicines to 18 dog and cat shelters.

metrics.context_qualifier: Distributed 3.5 tonnes of rice and dog kibble to shelters in Vietnam.
metrics.metric_name: Dogs and cats helped in shelters (food)

source.quote: Distributed 3.5 tonnes of rice and dog kibble to shelters in Vietnam.

metrics.context_qualifier: Supported Chinese groups that help dogs and cats, a jump from 200 groups in 2023 due to online training.

source.quote: In 2024, we supported over 400 Chinese groups that help dogs and cats.

metrics.context_qualifier: Treated at three smallies clinics, including 264 dogs and 172 cats.

source.quote: In 2024, our three smallies clinics treated 436 companion animals - 264 dogs and 172 cats.

metrics.context_qualifier: Neutered as part of the companion animal clinic services.

source.quote: And of these, 161 were neutered.

metrics.context_qualifier: Reached through online talks on social, emotional, and cognitive capacities of crows, penguins, orcas, and bears.

source.quote: Reached 5,200 people through online talks on the social, emotional and cognitive capacities of crows, penguins, orcas and bears via our Bilibili channel.

metrics.context_qualifier: Trained to deliver animal welfare and behavior lesson plans to students.

source.quote: Trained 63 teachers to deliver our animal welfare and behaviour lesson plans.

metrics.context_qualifier: Teachers delivered animal welfare and behavior lesson plans to students.

source.quote: They delivered the course to 866 students.

metrics.context_qualifier: Neutered through trap, neuter, return projects with 17 groups.

source.quote: Helped neuter 467 cats through our trap, neuter, return projects with 17 groups.

metrics.context_qualifier: 13 beautiful moon bears rescued and brought to sanctuaries in Vietnam.

source.quote: Rescued 13 precious moon bears and brought them home to our sanctuaries in Vietnam.

metrics.context_qualifier: Released into protected areas in Indonesia.

source.quote: Helped release 31 macaques into protected areas.

metrics.context_qualifier: Stopped selling dog and/or cat meat by reporting them to Chinese authorities.

source.quote: Stopped 10 restaurants from selling dog and/or cat meat by reporting them to the Chinese authorities.

metrics.context_qualifier: Held in China to promote cat and dog welfare.
metrics.metric_name: Cat and dog welfare campaigns held

source.quote: Held 52 campaigns in China to promote cat and dog welfare.

metrics.context_qualifier: Provided to rescued bears at all three sanctuaries.

source.quote: Provided 822 physiotherapy sessions to rescued bears.

metrics.context_qualifier: Performed on rescued bears, including 23 major surgeries.

source.quote: Performed 221 full-body health checks on our rescued bears, including 23 major surgeries.

metrics.context_qualifier: Rescued from elephant-riding tourism in Vietnam.

source.quote: Rescued 2 more elephants from elephant-riding tourism. Kham On and Y'Mam are now free to roam for the rest of their days.

metrics.context_qualifier: Former pet macaques rescued, rehabilitated, and released into Barumun Wildlife Reserve.

source.quote: Our Indonesian partner, Scorpion Foundation, rescued, rehabilitated and released 8 former pet macaques into Barumun Wildlife Reserve.

metrics.context_qualifier: Macaques rescued from the pet trade and rehabilitated, then released onto a protected island.

source.quote: Our Indonesian partner, Jakarta Animal Aid Network, released 12 macaques onto a protected island following their rescue from the pet trade and rehabilitation at their rescue centre in Bali.

metrics.context_qualifier: Chinese zoos stopped the use of animals in performances since 2018.

source.quote: Our 2024 survey shows that 23 Chinese zoos have stopped the use of animals in performances since our last survey in 2018.

metrics.context_qualifier: Milestone of 700th bear rescued in China and Vietnam since 2000.

source.quote: Celebrated the rescue of our 700th bear, handsome Christmas who arrived just in time for the holidays.

significant_events.event_name: New bear protection campaign in Vietnam

source.quote: In 2024, Animals Asia rolled out a major new bear protection campaign in Vietnam in a renewed push to end bile farming in the country once and for all.

significant_events.summary: Launched a major campaign in Hanoi to end bear bile farming, raising community awareness and promoting herbal alternatives.

significant_events.event_name: Campaign to end dog and cat meat trade in Vietnam

source.quote: In 2024, we stepped up our campaign to end the cruel dog and cat meat trade in Vietnam.

significant_events.summary: Stepped up campaign, including investigations, counting restaurants, and sharing results with government. Government also increased enforcement.

source.quote: And last year we reached an incredible milestone - we rescued our 700th bear, gorgeous Christmas!

significant_events.summary: Celebrated the rescue of the 700th bear, "Christmas," from a bile farm, bringing the total rescued since 2000 to 700.

source.quote: Rescued 13 precious moon bears and brought them home to our sanctuaries in Vietnam.

significant_events.summary: Rescued 13 moon bears from exploitation and brought them to sanctuaries in Vietnam for care.

significant_events.event_name: Support for Chinese dog and cat shelters

source.quote: Helped 13,350 shelter dogs and cats in China.

significant_events.summary: Helped 13,350 dogs and cats in 33 struggling shelters in China with food, medicine, and infrastructure upgrades.

source.quote: Helped rescue and release over 23,000 songbirds confiscated from illegal traders.

significant_events.summary: Helped rescue and release over 23,000 songbirds confiscated from illegal traders in Indonesia.

source.quote: Our Bach Ma vet team has launched its own Companion Animal Clinic catering to the cats and dogs of employees and families living in and around the sanctuary.

significant_events.summary: Launched a Companion Animal Clinic at Bach Ma sanctuary, providing free vaccinations, flea treatment, deworming, and neutering for local dogs and cats.

source.quote: Animals Asia started promoting trap, neuter, return for cats in China in 2008 and since then thousands of cats have joined the program, including 467 in 2024.

significant_events.summary: Neutered 467 cats through TNR projects with 17 groups, preventing millions of cats from being born into misery.

source.quote: Rescued 2 more elephants from elephant-riding tourism. Kham On and Y'Mam are now free to roam for the rest of their days.

significant_events.summary: Rescued Kham On and Y'Mam from elephant-riding tourism, allowing them to roam free in a forested enclosure.

source.quote: In 2024, we introduced annual physiotherapy assessments for our Tam Dao bears and launched a physio program for our new Bach Ma sanctuary.

significant_events.summary: Introduced annual physiotherapy assessments and launched a physio program for bears with mobility problems at sanctuaries.

significant_events.event_name: Construction of second floor for macaques

source.quote: Constructed a second floor for macaques in their socialisation enclosure at the rescue centre run by our partner, Scorpion Foundation.

significant_events.summary: Built a second floor in a macaque socialisation enclosure to increase climbing opportunities and reduce stress.

source.quote: This included building tunnels to connect the macaque enclosures at two Vietnamese facilities - the Hanoi Wildlife Rescue Centre and the Phong Nha Ke Bang Rescue Centre.

significant_events.summary: Built tunnels connecting macaque enclosures at two Vietnamese facilities to allow socialisation and access to different environments.

significant_events.event_name: Wild Bird Welfare citizen science project

source.quote: At the start of 2024, we launched a new citizen science project in China - Wild Bird Welfare - to assess the harm to birds from mist nets.

significant_events.summary: Launched a project in China to assess harm to birds from mist nets, conduct field surveys, and raise public awareness.

source.quote: Mandala Hunter-Ishikawa, who heads our Veterinary Welfare Training Program, took her message of easing pain for animals to nearly 400 practising veterinarians, assistants and industry stakeholders in 13 major cities across China.

significant_events.summary: Mandala Hunter-Ishikawa led a program for nearly 400 veterinarians and industry stakeholders in China on pain management and animal welfare.

source.quote: Our annual World Rabies Day awareness events in China included free rabies injections for dogs, basic body checks for cats and dogs, and a quiz on preventing rabies.

significant_events.summary: Held annual events in China, including free rabies injections, body checks for pets, and quizzes on rabies prevention.

source.quote: The hot and humid weather didn't stop the crowds from coming when we launched our open-air photography exhibition in Chengdu, China in July.

significant_events.summary: Launched an open-air photography exhibition in Chengdu, China, featuring winning entries from a competition to raise awareness of companion animals.

source.quote: Our Wow Zoo manual - so far distributed in Xi'an, Beijing, Qingdao, Hefei and Chengdu - encourages students to think about the animals' physical and emotional needs, and provides activities for them to do before, during and after their visit to the zoo.

significant_events.summary: Distributed a manual to teachers and parents in China to guide them on animal sentience and welfare during zoo visits.

source.quote: Tragically, other bears enjoyed only months, and some just weeks, in our care.

data.original_text: Animals Asia is dedicated to ending the barbaric practice of bear bile farming and improving animal welfare in China and Vietnam. Over 10,000 bears - mainly moon bears, but also sun bears and brown bears - are held captive on bile farms in China, and around 400 in Vietnam.
We have rescued over 650 bears from this terrible industry enabling them to live without pain or suffering in our rescue centers in China and Vietnam.
In 2021 we undertook the largest Asiatic black bear rescue in the world, which involved moving 101 moon bears from an ex-bile farm in China to our sanctuary in Chengdu.
In 2017, we signed a legally binding agreement with the Vietnamese government that will see us work together to close every farm with the aim of rescuing all remaining bears in Vietnam.
Animals Asia Foundation (AAF) is a Hong Kong–based charity that seeks to end cruelty to animals in Asia.

The organization raises awareness of the inhumane methods used in bear bile farming, which involve bears living up to 25 years in small cages, with metal catheters inserted into their abdomens for bile extraction, or even open wounds through which the bile drips.
The organization also works "to reduce the demand for bile in Asia by promoting affordable, effective and cruelty free alternatives."
Animals Asia has rescued over 670 bears, caring for them at our award-winning bear sanctuaries in China and Vietnam.
We also work against the trade in dogs and cats for food in Asia and lobby to improve the welfare of companion animals and promote humane population management.

We campaign for better conditions in zoos and safari parks in Asia and work closely with governing authorities to improve animal management and increase awareness of the welfare needs of captive wild animals.

We provide training and educational services to animal management professionals, veterinarians, educators, and the public to raise awareness of animal welfare and animal sentience concepts and drive long-term change.
Protect bears, ensure they are free from harm, and provide them with sanctuary.
Improve the welfare of captive wild animals.
Improve the welfare of dogs and cats.
Animals Asia's Cat and Dog welfare team raised donations and delivered over six tons of cat and dog food to support animals impacted by the COVID-19 quarantine in Wuhan.

Animals Asia's Cat and Dog Welfare team achieved a huge victory after receiving news of the new regulation. Stated in China's recent national catalogue of Livestock and Poultry Genetic Resources, it bans the selling of live dogs and dog meat for food.
Animals Asia rescued 10 more bears, bringing to 680 the total number rescued.
We helped to free tens of thousands of trafficked songbirds in Indonesia.
Our therapy dogs visited over 9,000 people in hospitals, schools and care homes.
We completed Phase One of our second bear sanctuary in Vietnam.
We helped rebuild a fire-damaged shelter in China, benefiting 250 cats.
